title: Zinzana Heat Wave
lead: Zinzana is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.17. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zinzana is causing extreme temperatures, with a Z-Score of +4.17 indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.6 GG, and low wind speed of 1.7 km/h. 
 The humidity level is at 48%, which can exacerbate the heat-related discomfort and health risks.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
